sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115348" key="yammoko/sioi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψαμμοκόσιοι</orth>, <sense id="n115348.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ψαμμακόσιοι</ref> </xr> (q. v.), which is to be preferred.</sense> </entryFree>
